text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Here we are at last, Tokyo Mega Illumi is on!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Wow… all the lights totally change the usual vibe!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
The whole area sure is glittering as it should. 
I'm glad our work helped♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: And the highlight is of course the Mega Tree!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
We sure managed to find a great deal of 
ornaments to decorate it with, didn't we.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
It's the fruit of our labors! We'll see it 
in many snazzy pics, I bet…!

text_block_list.name: All 3
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa…!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
My goodness… Amazing, isn't it. 
Everything's all glittery and sparkly…

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Wow, the lights we hung up together really look beautiful… 
Oh I almost forgot — pictures! I have to show this to everyone 
in Tomakomai…!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Rickey ☆ Lucky ☆ Mega Tree ☆ 
We all worked hard for it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you lot. Admirin' the tree's fine and all, but we got 
a concert to prepare for, remember?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ah, that's right! Thanks, Inari!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Tarumae! Acute! We should head to the dressing room!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hahah! Those three are a joy to watch, huh.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Their cheerfulness helped a lot.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yep☆ They're a trio of juniors Falco's very proud of♪

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Anyway… this here's one real magnificent tree, huh. 
It's dazzling to look at.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Time's come for our Christmas concert☆ 
Tarumae, Acute — are you ready?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: 'Course, ready to go any time!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I practiced a bunch in between helping out. 
All good here♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Alriiight, off we go then! Let's sing them our Christmas song…

text_block_list.name: All 3
text_block_list.text: KIRARI MAGIC SHOW!
